repository.readme:
# QuickBackupM

> [!TIP]
> еҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒжӣҙдёәе…Ҳиҝӣе®Ңе–„зҡ„еӨҮд»Ҫи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲпјҢдҪ еҸҜд»ҘзңӢзңӢ [Prime Backup](https://github.com/TISUnion/PrimeBackup) жҸ’д»¶

[English](https://github.com/TISUnion/QuickBackupM/blob/master/README_en.md)

дёҖдёӘж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„еҝ«йҖҹеӨҮд»ҪпјҶеӣһжЎЈжҸ’д»¶

`master` еҲҶж”Ҝдёәдёӯж–ҮзүҲпјҢ`english` еҲҶж”ҜдёәиӢұж–ҮзүҲ

йңҖиҰҒ `v2.0.1` д»ҘдёҠзҡ„ [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged)

![snapshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TISUnion/QuickBackupM/master/snapshot.png)

еӨҮд»Ҫзҡ„еӯҳжЎЈе°Ҷдјҡеӯҳж”ҫиҮі qb_multi ж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӯпјҢж–Үд»¶зӣ®еҪ•ж јејҸеҰӮдёӢпјҡ
```
mcd_root/
    server.py

    server/
        world/

    qb_multi/
        slot1/
            info.json
            world/

        slot2/
            ...
        ...

        overwrite/
            info.txt
            world/
```

## е‘Ҫд»Өж јејҸиҜҙжҳҺ

`!!qb` жҳҫзӨәеё®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ

`!!qb make [<comment>]` еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘеӮЁеӯҳиҮіж§ҪдҪҚ `1` зҡ„еӨҮд»ҪпјҢе№¶е°ҶеҗҺз§»е·Іжңүж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ`<comment>` дёәеҸҜйҖүеӯҳжЎЈжіЁйҮҠ

`!!qb back [<slot>]` еӣһжЎЈдёәж§ҪдҪҚ `<slot>` зҡ„еӯҳжЎЈгҖӮ

`!!qb del <slot>` еҲ йҷӨж§ҪдҪҚ `<slot>` зҡ„еӯҳжЎЈгҖӮй»ҳи®Өдёәж§ҪдҪҚ 1

`!!qb rename <slot> <comment>` дҝ®ж”№ж§ҪдҪҚ `<slot>` зҡ„жіЁйҮҠпјҢеҚійҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚиҝҷдёҖж§ҪдҪҚ

`!!qb confirm` еңЁжү§иЎҢ `back` еҗҺдҪҝз”ЁпјҢеҶҚж¬ЎзЎ®и®ӨжҳҜеҗҰиҝӣиЎҢеӣһжЎЈ

`!!qb abort` еңЁд»»дҪ•ж—¶еҖҷй”®е…ҘжӯӨжҢҮд»ӨеҸҜдёӯж–ӯеӣһжЎЈ

`!!qb list` жҳҫзӨәеҗ„ж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„еӯҳжЎЈдҝЎжҒҜ

`!!qb reload` йҮҚж–°еҠ иҪҪй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶

еҪ“ `<slot>` жңӘиў«жҢҮе®ҡж—¶й»ҳи®ӨйҖүжӢ©ж§ҪдҪҚ `1`

## й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶йҖүйЎ№иҜҙжҳҺ

й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёә `config/QuickBackupM.json`гҖӮе®ғдјҡеңЁз¬¬дёҖж¬ЎиҝҗиЎҢж—¶иҮӘеҠЁз”ҹжҲҗ

### slots

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ

```
"slots": [
    {
        "delete_protection": 0
    },
    {
        "delete_protection": 0
    },
    {
        "delete_protection": 0
    },
    {
        "delete_protection": 10800
    },
    {
        "delete_protection": 259200
    }
]
```

жҜҸдёӘж§ҪдҪҚиў«дҝқжҠӨдёҚиў«иҰҶзӣ–зҡ„з§’ж•°гҖӮи®ҫзҪ®дёә `0` еҲҷиЎЁзӨәдёҚдҝқжҠӨ

иҜҘеҲ—иЎЁзҡ„й•ҝеәҰд№ҹеҶіе®ҡдәҶж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„ж•°йҮҸ

еңЁй»ҳи®ӨеҖјдёӯпјҢдёҖе…ұжңү 5 дёӘж§ҪдҪҚпјҢе…¶дёӯеүҚдёүдёӘж§ҪдҪҚжңӘи®ҫзҪ®дҝқжҠӨж—¶й—ҙпјҢз¬¬еӣӣдёӘж§ҪдҪҚдјҡиў«дҝқжҠӨдёүдёӘе°Ҹж—¶пјҲ3 * 60 * 60 з§’пјүпјҢз¬¬дә”дёӘж§ҪдҪҚдјҡиў«дҝқжҠӨдёүеӨ©

иҜ·дҝқиҜҒдҝқжҠӨж—¶й—ҙжҳҜйҡҸзқҖж§ҪдҪҚеәҸеҸ·еҚ•и°ғдёҚдёӢйҷҚзҡ„пјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜз¬¬ n з»ҷдёӘж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„дҝқжҠӨж—¶й—ҙдёҚиғҪеӨ§дәҺз¬¬ n + 1 дёӘж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„дҝқжҠӨж—¶й—ҙпјҢеҗҰеҲҷеҸҜиғҪжңүжңӘе®ҡд№үзҡ„иЎҢдёә

з”ұж—§зҡ„ QuickBackupM жҸ’д»¶еҲӣе»әзҡ„еӨҮд»ҪдёҚж”ҜжҢҒиҝҷдёӘзү№жҖ§

### size_display

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј: `true`

жҹҘзңӢеӨҮд»ҪеҲ—иЎЁжҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәеҚ з”Ёз©әй—ҙ

### turn_off_auto_save

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј: `true`

жҳҜеҗҰеңЁеӨҮд»Ҫж—¶дёҙж—¶е…ій—ӯиҮӘеҠЁдҝқеӯҳ

### enable_copy_file_range

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј: `false`

дҪҝз”Ё `os.copy_file_range` иҝӣиЎҢж–Үд»¶зҡ„еӨҚеҲ¶

еңЁжҹҗдәӣж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹдёӯпјҢе®ғдјҡдҪҝз”ЁеҹәдәҺеҶҷж—¶еӨҚеҲ¶пјҲcopy-on-writeпјүзҡ„ reflink жҠҖжңҜпјҢд»ҺиҖҢжһҒеӨ§ең°жҸҗеҚҮеӨҚеҲ¶йҖҹеәҰ

йңҖжұӮпјҡ

- Linux е№іеҸ°
- Python >= 3.8
- йҖүйЎ№ `backup_format` дёә `plain`

### concurrent_copy_workers

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ`0`

еҸӮиҖғеҖјпјҡ`0`, `2`, `4`

еӨҚеҲ¶ж–Үд»¶ж—¶зҡ„е№¶иЎҢеәҰпјҢеҪ“е…¶еҖјдёә `n` ж—¶пјҢQBM е°ҶдҪҝз”Ё `n` зәҝзЁӢе№¶иЎҢеӨҚеҲ¶ж–Үд»¶

еҪ“дҪҝз”Ё SSD жҲ–е…¶д»–й«ҳ IO жҖ§иғҪзҡ„еӯҳеӮЁи®ҫеӨҮж—¶пјҢејҖеҗҜе№¶иЎҢеӨҚеҲ¶еҸҜд»Ҙжңүж•ҲжҸҗеҚҮеӨҚеҲ¶зҡ„йҖҹеәҰпјҢдҪҶ CPUгҖҒзЈҒзӣҳиҙҹиҪҪд№ҹдјҡжҳҫи‘—еўһеҠ 

и®ҫдёә `0` д»Ҙе…ій—ӯе№¶иЎҢеӨҚеҲ¶

йңҖжұӮпјҡ

- йҖүйЎ№ `backup_format` дёә `plain`

### ignored_files

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј:

```
"ignored_files": [
    "session.lock"
]
```

еңЁеӨҮд»Ҫж—¶еҝҪз•Ҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶еҗҚеҲ—иЎЁпјҢй»ҳи®Өд»…еҢ…еҗ« `session.lock` д»Ҙи§ЈеҶі `session.lock` иў«жңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҚ з”ЁеҜјиҮҙеӨҮд»ҪеӨұиҙҘзҡ„й—®йўҳ

иӢҘж–Үд»¶еҗҚеӯ—з¬ҰдёІд»Ҙ `*` ејҖеӨҙпјҢеҲҷе°ҶеҝҪз•Ҙд»ҘжҢҮе®ҡеӯ—з¬ҰдёІз»“е°ҫзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҰӮ `*.test` иЎЁзӨәеҝҪз•ҘжүҖжңүд»Ҙ `.test` з»“е°ҫзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҰӮ `a.test`

иӢҘж–Үд»¶еҗҚеӯ—з¬ҰдёІд»Ҙ `*` з»“е°ҫпјҢеҲҷе°ҶеҝҪз•Ҙд»ҘжҢҮе®ҡеӯ—з¬ҰдёІејҖеӨҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҰӮ `temp*` иЎЁзӨәеҝҪз•ҘжүҖжңүд»Ҙ `temp` ејҖеӨҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҰӮ `tempfile`

### saved_world_keywords

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј:

```
"saved_world_keywords": [
    "Saved the game",
    "Saved the world"
]
```

з”ЁдәҺиҜҶеҲ«жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝе·Ідҝқеӯҳе®ҢжҜ•еӯҳжЎЈзҡ„е…ій”®иҜҚ

еҰӮжһңжңҚеҠЎеҷЁзҡ„иҫ“еҮәдёҺд»»дҪ•дёҖдёӘе…ій”®иҜҚзӣёз¬ҰпјҢеҲҷи®ӨдёәеӯҳжЎЈе·Ідҝқеӯҳе®ҢжҜ•пјҢйҡҸеҗҺжҸ’д»¶е°ҶејҖе§ӢеӨҚеҲ¶еӯҳжЎЈж–Үд»¶

### backup_path

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј: `./qb_multi`

еӨҮд»ҪеӮЁеӯҳзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„

### server_path

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ`./server`

жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝж–Үд»¶еӨ№зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ`./server` еҚідёә MCDR зҡ„й»ҳи®ӨжңҚеҠЎз«Ҝж–Үд»¶еӨ№и·Ҝеҫ„

### overwrite_backup_folder

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј: `overwrite`

иў«иҰҶзӣ–зҡ„еӯҳжЎЈзҡ„еӨҮд»ҪдҪҚзҪ®пјҢеңЁй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶еқҮдёәй»ҳи®ӨеҖјзҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢи·Ҝеҫ„дёә `./qb_multi/overwrite`

### world_names

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј:

```
"world_names": [
    "world"
]
```

йңҖиҰҒеӨҮд»Ҫзҡ„дё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҲ—иЎЁпјҢеҺҹзүҲжңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҸӘдјҡжңүдёҖдёӘдё–з•ҢпјҢеңЁй»ҳи®ӨеҖјеҹәзЎҖдёҠеЎ«дёҠдё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№зҡ„еҗҚеӯ—еҚіеҸҜ

еҜ№дәҺйқһеҺҹзүҲжңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҰӮж°ҙжЎ¶гҖҒж°ҙйҫҷеӨҙжңҚеҠЎз«ҜпјҢдјҡжңүдёүдёӘдё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҢжӯӨж—¶еҸҜеЎ«еҶҷпјҡ

```
"world_names": [
    "world",
    "world_nether",
    "world_the_end"
]
```

еҰӮжһңжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„дё–з•ҢеҗҚжҢҮеҗ‘дәҶдёҖдёӘз¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘж–Үд»¶, еҲҷиҜҘй“ҫжҺҘж–Үд»¶жҢҮеҗ‘зҡ„жңҖз»Ҳе®һйҷ…дё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҢд»ҘеҸҠдёӯйҖ”жүҖжңүи§Јеј•з”ЁеҮәзҡ„з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘж–Үд»¶йғҪдјҡиў«еӨҮд»Ҫ:

```sh
mcd_root/
    server.py

    server/
        world -> target_world # world жҳҜдёҖдёӘеҪ“еүҚжҢҮеҗ‘ target_world ж–Үд»¶еӨ№зҡ„з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘ
        target_world/
        other_world/

    qb_multi/
        slot1/
            info.json
            world -> target_world  # з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘеӨҚеҲ¶еҲ°дәҶеӨҮд»Ҫж§Ҫдёӯ
            target_world/ # з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘеҪ“еүҚжҢҮеҗ‘зҡ„дё–з•ҢдёҖиө·еӨҚеҲ¶еҲ°дәҶеӨҮд»Ҫж§Ҫдёӯ
        ...
```

жү§иЎҢ `!!qb back` ж—¶пјҢдјҡд»ҺеӨҮд»Ҫж§ҪдёӯжҢҮе®ҡдё–з•ҢеҗҚеҜ№еә”зҡ„з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘејҖе§ӢпјҢе°ҶжүҖжңүз¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘд»ҘеҸҠжңҖз»Ҳе®һйҷ…зҡ„дё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№жҒўеӨҚиҮіжңҚеҠЎз«Ҝзҡ„еҜ№еә”дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮиҝҷиЎЁзӨәеҰӮжһңеҗҺз»ӯжңҚеҠЎз«Ҝзҡ„з¬ҰеҸ·й“ҫжҺҘжӣҙж”№дәҶжҢҮеҗ‘зҡ„дё–з•ҢпјҢеӣһжЎЈж—¶е°ҶжҒўеӨҚеҲ°еӨҮд»Ҫж—¶дҝқеӯҳзҡ„дё–з•ҢпјҢдё”дёҚеҗҢдё–з•Ңзҡ„еҶ…е®№дёҚдјҡдә’зӣёиҰҶзӣ–

### backup_format

еӨҮд»Ҫзҡ„еӮЁеӯҳж јејҸ

| еҖј        | еҗ«д№ү                                                                        |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `plain`  | зӣҙжҺҘеӨҚеҲ¶ж–Үд»¶еӨ№/ж–Үд»¶жқҘеӮЁеӯҳгҖӮй»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҢиҝҷеҗҢж—¶д№ҹжҳҜ v1.8 д»ҘеүҚзүҲжң¬зҡ„ QBM е”ҜдёҖж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„еӮЁеӯҳж јејҸ                          |
| `tar`    | дҪҝз”Ё tar ж јејҸзӣҙжҺҘжү“еҢ…еӮЁеӯҳиҮі `backup.tar` ж–Үд»¶дёӯгҖӮжҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”ЁпјҢеҸҜжңүж•ҲеҮҸе°‘ж–Үд»¶зҡ„ж•°йҮҸпјҢдҪҶж— жі•ж–№дҫҝең°и®ҝй—®еӨҮд»ҪйҮҢйқўзҡ„ж–Үд»¶         |
| `tar_gz` | дҪҝз”Ё tar.gz ж јејҸеҺӢзј©жү“еҢ…еӮЁеӯҳиҮі `backup.tar.gz` ж–Үд»¶дёӯгҖӮиғҪеҮҸе°ҸеӨҮд»ҪдҪ“з§ҜпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеӨҮд»Ҫ/еӣһжЎЈзҡ„иҖ—ж—¶е°Ҷжҳҫи‘—еўһеҠ гҖӮж”ҜжҢҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үеҺӢзј©зӯүзә§ |
| `tar_xz` | дҪҝз”Ё tar.xz ж јејҸеҺӢзј©жү“еҢ…еӮЁеӯҳиҮі `backup.tar.xz` ж–Үд»¶дёӯгҖӮиғҪжңҖеӨ§еҢ–ең°еҮҸе°ҸеӨҮд»ҪдҪ“з§ҜпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеӨҮд»Ҫ/еӣһжЎЈзҡ„иҖ—ж—¶е°ҶжһҒеӨ§еўһеҠ        |

ж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„еӨҮд»ҪжЁЎејҸдјҡеӮЁеӯҳеңЁж§ҪдҪҚзҡ„ `info.json` дёӯпјҢе№¶еңЁеӣһжЎЈж—¶иҜ»еҸ–пјҢеӣ жӯӨзҡ„дёҚеҗҢзҡ„ж§ҪдҪҚеҸҜд»ҘжңүзқҖдёҚеҗҢзҡ„еӮЁеӯҳж јејҸгҖӮ
иӢҘе…¶еҖјдёҚеӯҳеңЁпјҢQBM дјҡеҒҮе®ҡиҝҷдёӘж§ҪдҪҚжҳҜз”ұж—§зүҲ QBM еҲӣе»әзҡ„пјҢе№¶дҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖј `plain`

иӢҘй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯзҡ„ `backup_format` йқһжі•пјҢеҲҷдјҡдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖј `plain`

### compress_level

дёҖдёӘ 1 ~ 9 зҡ„ж•ҙж•°пјҢд»ЈиЎЁеңЁ `backup_format` йҖүйЎ№дёә `tar_gz` ж—¶пјҢдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҺӢзј©зӯүзә§гҖӮ
зӯүзә§и¶Ҡй«ҳпјҢеҺӢзј©зҺҮзӣёеҜ№и¶Ҡй«ҳпјҢиҖ—ж—¶д№ҹи¶Ҡй«ҳ

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ1

### minimum_permission_level

й»ҳи®ӨеҖј:

```
"minimum_permission_level": {
	"make": 1,
	"back": 2,
	"del": 2,
    "rename": 2,
	"confirm": 1,
	"abort": 1,
	"reload": 2,
	"list": 0,
}
```

дёҖдёӘеӯ—е…ёпјҢд»ЈиЎЁдҪҝз”ЁдёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢжҢҮд»ӨйңҖиҰҒжқғйҷҗзӯүзә§гҖӮж•°еҖјеҗ«д№үи§Ғ[жӯӨеӨ„](https://mcdreforged.readthedocs.io/zh_CN/latest/permission.html)

жҠҠжүҖжңүж•°еҖји®ҫзҪ®жҲҗ `0` д»Ҙи®©жүҖжңүдәәеқҮеҸҜж“ҚдҪң

repository.readme:
# quick_run_cmd
-----
[дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/rickyhoho/quick_run_cmd/blob/master/README_cn.md)

A plugin for [MCDReforged1.x](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) which can run command script quickly in server.

Type `!!qrcmd` or `!!qr` to see the help page

You may fill configure file `MCDR/config/quick_run_cmd.json` to edit it or edit by `!!qrcmd`

# permission

`user` or above permission can use script and check for script list

`helper` or above permission can use all of the command

# config
-----
If you dont have any knowledge about json, then dont edit it.

`"command_list"`   The script list
| name       | type    | example                                    | funtion                      |
| ---------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------- |
| "name"     | `str`   | `"whp"`                                    | The name of script           |
| "info"     | `str`   | `"testing"`                                | The info of script           |
| "delay"    | `float` | `"0.5"`                                    | The dealy of running command |
| "commands" | `list`  | `"player alex spawn"`, `"player alex use"` | The command list of script   |

repository.readme:
# Region File Updater

дёҖдёӘжӣҙж–°жң¬жңҚеҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶иҮіз”ҹеӯҳжңҚ `!!qb` еӯҳжЎЈеҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶зҡ„жҸ’д»¶

йңҖиҰҒ [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) v1.0 д»ҘдёҠ

йңҖиҰҒ [MinecraftDataAPI](https://github.com/MCDReforged/MinecraftDataAPI)

A MCDR plugin to help you update region files in game

[MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) v1.0+ is required

[MinecraftDataAPI](https://github.com/MCDReforged/MinecraftDataAPI) is needed

# жҢҮд»ӨиҜҙжҳҺ / Command description

`!!region` жҳҫзӨәеё®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ / show help message

`!!region add` ж·»еҠ зҺ©е®¶жүҖеңЁдҪҚзҪ®зҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / add the region file where the player is in

`!!region add [d] [x] [z]` ж·»еҠ жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / add a specific region file

`!!region del` еҲ йҷӨзҺ©е®¶жүҖеңЁдҪҚзҪ®зҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / delete the region file where the player is in

`!!region del [d] [x] [z]` еҲ йҷӨжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / delete a specific region file

`!!region delete-all` еҲ йҷӨжүҖжңүеҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / delete all region files

`!!region list` еҲ—еҮәеҫ…жӣҙж–°зҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶ / list all added region files

`!!region history` иҫ“еҮәдёҠдёҖж¬Ўupdateзҡ„з»“жһң / print the result of the latest update

`!!region update` жӣҙж–°еҲ—иЎЁдёӯзҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶пјҢиҝҷе°ҶйҮҚеҗҜжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ / update all selected region files, which will restart the server

# еҸӮж•°иҜҙжҳҺ / Parameter Description

[d]: з»ҙеәҰеәҸеҸ·пјҢдё»дё–з•Ңдёә0пјҢдёӢз•Ңдёә-1пјҢжң«ең°дёә1 / dimension index, overworld: 0, nether: -1, end: 1

[x] [z]: еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶еқҗж ҮпјҢеҰӮr.-3.1.mcaзҡ„еҢәеҹҹж–Үд»¶еқҗж Үдёәx=-3 z=1 / the coordinate of the region file, for example r.-3.1.mca's coordinate is x=-3 z=1

# дҫӢеӯҗ / Sample

`!!region add 0 3 2` ж·»еҠ дё»дё–з•Ңзҡ„r.3.2.mcaиҮіжӣҙж–°еҲ—иЎЁ / add overworld's r.3.2.mca to the updating list

# й…ҚзҪ® / Config

1.17+ зҡ„еӯҳжЎЈдёӯ, е®һдҪ“зӣёе…іж•°жҚ®иў«еҚ•зӢ¬еӯҳеӮЁеҲ°д№ӢеүҚзҡ„еҢәеқ—ж•°жҚ®д№ӢеӨ–

еҸҜд»Ҙдҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®йЎ№ `dimension_region_folder` еҰӮдёӢ, жқҘи®©е®һдҪ“ж•°жҚ®еңЁжӣҙж–°ж—¶д№ҹиҝӣиЎҢеҗҢжӯҘ

For 1.17+, the entities data was saved in an specified folder outside region folder.

You can modify the config `dimension_region_folder` to make entities sync during region update

```json5
{
    "enabled": true,
    "source_world_directory": "./qb_multi/slot1/world",
    "destination_world_directory": "./server/world",
    "dimension_region_folder": {
        "-1": ["DIM-1/region", "DIM-1/poi", "DIM-1/entities"],
        "0": ["region", "poi", "entities"],
        "1": ["DIM1/region", "DIM1/poi", "DIM1/entities"]
    }
}
```

repository.readme:
# MCDR-Renewability
A [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) plugin that allows players to clone non-renewable items.

дёҖдёӘе…Ғи®ёзҺ©е®¶еӨҚеҲ¶дёҚеҸҜеҶҚз”ҹзү©е“Ғзҡ„ [MCDR](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) жҸ’д»¶гҖӮ

[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Fidelxyz/MCDR-Renewability.svg)](https://github.com/Fidelxyz/MCDR-Renewability/blob/master/LICENSE)
[![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Fidelxyz/MCDR-Renewability.svg)](https://github.com/Fidelxyz/MCDR-Renewability/releases)

## е®үиЈ…

дҫқиө– [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) 1.x е’Ң [MinecraftDataAPI](https://github.com/MCDReforged/MinecraftDataAPI)гҖӮ

## з”Ёжі•

`!!clone` еӨҚеҲ¶жүӢдёӯзү©е“Ғ

`!!clone help` жҹҘзңӢеё®еҠ©

`!!clone query` жҹҘиҜўд»Ҡж—Ҙеү©дҪҷеӨҚеҲ¶ж¬Ўж•°

`!!clone list` жҹҘзңӢеҸҜеӨҚеҲ¶зҡ„зү©е“ҒеҲ—иЎЁ

## й…ҚзҪ®

з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дјҡеңЁ MCDR зӣ®еҪ•дёӯзҡ„ `config/renewability/` зӣ®еҪ•ж–°е»ә `config.json` й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶гҖӮ

### `'max_daily_items_cloned'`

жҜҸдәәжҜҸж—Ҙе…Ғи®ёеӨҚеҲ¶зү©е“Ғзҡ„жңҖеӨ§ж•°йҮҸгҖӮ

зұ»еһӢпјҡ`Integer`

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ`1`

### `'allowed_items_list'`

е…Ғи®ёеӨҚеҲ¶зҡ„зү©е“Ғ IDгҖӮ

зұ»еһӢпјҡ`list`

й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ

```json
[
	"minecraft:elytra",
	"minecraft:enchanted_golden_apple",
	"minecraft:sponge"
]
```

repository.name: MCDR-plugins
repository.readme:
# MCDR-plugins
A plugin library for [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged).  
My own lightweight plugin.
## Installation
place ``run_some_commands_v1.0.0.mcdr`` in the ``./plugins`` folder.
## Config
After the plugin is loaded, ``rsc.config`` should be created in the ``./config`` folder.  
Or you can create it manually.  
`` {"0":[],"1":[],"2":[],"3":[],"4":[]} ``

## Commands
```
!!rsc - Show help message
!!rsc <command> [<params>] - execute vanilla command  
!!rsclist - list all the commands that had been added into the whitelist  
!!rscadd <command> <permission> - add the command into the whitelist  
!!rscrem <command> - remove the command from the whitelist  
P/S: The permission in the !!rscadd should be the highest permission value for the command that can be executed by.  
```
# MCDR-plugins
дёҖеҖӢ [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) зҡ„жҸ’д»¶еә«  
жҲ‘иҮӘе·ұиЈҪдҪңзҡ„иј•йҮҸзҙҡжҸ’д»¶
## е®үиЈқ
е°Ү ``run_some_commands_v1.0.0.mcdr`` ж”ҫзҪ®еңЁ ``./plugins`` иіҮж–ҷеӨҫиЈЎ.
## Config
еҠ ијүжҸ’д»¶еҗҺ, ``rsc.config`` е°ҮиҮӘеӢ•иў«з”ҹжҲҗдәҺ ``./config`` иіҮж–ҷеӨҫиЈЎ  
дҪ д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжүӢеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗ   
`` {"0":[],"1":[],"2":[],"3":[],"4":[]} ``

## жҢҮд»Ө
```
!!rsc - йЎҜзӨәйҖҷжўқж¶ҲжҒҜ  
!!rsc <еҺҹзүҲжҢҮд»Ө> [<еҸғж•ё>] - еҹ·иЎҢеҺҹзүҲжҢҮд»Ө  
!!rsclist - йЎҜзӨәжүҖжңүе·Іиў«ж·»еҠ иҮізҷҪеҗҚе–®зҡ„жҢҮд»Ө  
!!rscadd <еҺҹзүҲжҢҮд»Ө> <ж¬Ҡйҷҗ> - ж·»еҠ жҢҮд»ӨиҮізҷҪеҗҚе–®  
!!rscrem <еҺҹзүҲжҢҮд»Ө> - еҫһзҷҪеҗҚе–®дёӯз§»йҷӨжҢҮд»Ө  
P/S: и«ӢеңЁиЁӯзҪ®ж¬ҠйҷҗжҷӮе°Үж¬ҠйҷҗиЁӯзҲІжңҖй«ҳеҸҜеҹ·иЎҢжӯӨжҢҮд»Өзҡ„ж¬Ҡйҷҗд»Јиҷҹ  
```

repository.readme:
# Seed
> Get world seed without op permission.

## Preview

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/106148777/226171691-12bcd497-35a6-4680-a113-b5754f0d435b.png)

## Configure

`config/seed/config.json`
- `command`: Command to get seed in console
- `parser`: Parser for the command result

Default config file:
```
{
    'command': 'seed',
    'parser': 'Seed: [{}]'
}
```

The default configuration already supports most server software (without plugin/mods).

## Thanks to

This plugin was inspired by [`MCDReforged/Seed`](https://github.com/MCDReforged/Seed)

Thanks to @[alex3236](https://github.com/alex3236) for refactoring the codeпјҲпјҲ

repository.readme:
Server Redirect
---------

**з®ҖдҪ“дёӯж–Ү** | [English](https://github.com/CmmmmmmLau/ServerRedirect/tree/master/./README_en.md)

дёҖдёӘз”ЁжқҘдёҺеҸҰдёҖдёӘеҗҢеҗҚзҡ„ [Server Redirect](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/server-redirect) жЁЎз»„/жҸ’д»¶ й…ҚеҗҲдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„[MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged)жҸ’д»¶.

***
## д»Ӣз»Қ
иҜҘжҸ’д»¶еҝ…йЎ»иҰҒдёҺ `Server Redirect` жЁЎз»„/жҸ’д»¶е…ұеҗҢдҪҝз”Ё. иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶иғҪеӨҹеңЁдёҚз»ҷдәҲзҺ©е®¶д»»дҪ• `Server Redirect` жҢҮд»Өжқғйҷҗзҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢи®©е…¶и·іиҪ¬еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ.

еҰӮжһңдҪ жғіиҰҒжҗӯе»әдёҖдёӘй«ҳзүҲжң¬(>1.12.2)зҡ„жЁЎз»„жңҚ, дҪҶеҚҙеҸҲеӣ дёә`Waterfall` е’Ң `Velocity` еҸҲдёҚж”ҜжҢҒ, йӮЈд№ҲиҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶жҳҜдёҖдёӘиҪ»йҮҸеҢ–зҡ„и§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲ.

***
## жј”зӨә
![demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CmmmmmmLau/ServerRedirect/master/./demo/demo.gif)
![demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CmmmmmmLau/ServerRedirect/master/./demo/demo2.gif)

***
## йҮҚиҰҒдәӢйЎ№
`Server Redirect` жЁЎз»„/жҸ’д»¶ **еҝ…йЎ»** иҰҒеҗҢж—¶е®үиЈ…еңЁ `жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝ` е’Ң `е®ўжҲ·з«Ҝ`. иҝҷеҸӘжҳҜдёҖдёӘ MCDReforged жҸ’д»¶еӣ жӯӨдёҚжҸҗдҫӣд»»дҪ•жңҚеҠЎеҷЁд»ЈзҗҶеҠҹиғҪ, е®ғеҸӘжҳҜдёҖдёӘеё®еҠ©дҪ е®һзҺ°й«ҳзүҲжң¬жЁЎз»„жңҚзҫӨз»„иҝӣиЎҢи·ЁжңҚзҡ„дёҖдёӘиҪ»йҮҸеҢ–ж–№жЎҲ.

д»…еңЁ `Spigot` 1.12.2 жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝе’Ң `Forge` 1.12.2 е®ўжҲ·з«ҜдёӯиҝӣиЎҢиҝҮжөӢиҜ•.

зҗҶи®әдёҠеҸӘиҰҒ `Server Redirect` ж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„зүҲжң¬иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶е°ұиғҪе·ҘдҪң.

д»»дҪ•й—®йўҳжҲ–иҖ…е»әи®®иҜ·жҸҗдәӨ `issue` жҲ– `Pull request`
***
## йЈҹз”Ёж•ҷзЁӢ
1. еғҸеҫҖеёёдёҖж ·е…ҲжҠҠMinecraftжңҚеҠЎеҷЁи·‘иө·жқҘз„¶еҗҺеҺ» [Server Redirect](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/server-redirect) дёӢиҪҪеҜ№еә”зҡ„жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝ жЁЎз»„/жҸ’д»¶ е№¶ж”ҫе…ҘеҜ№еә”ж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҶ….
2. дёӢиҪҪиҜҘжҸ’д»¶е№¶иҝҗиЎҢдёҖж¬Ўд»Ҙдҫҝз”ҹжҲҗй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶.
3. дҝ®ж”№иҝҷдёӘй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶, е№¶е°ҶдҪ зҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁең°еқҖе’Ңз«ҜеҸЈеЎ«иҝӣеҺ». **зӣ®еүҚжҡӮж—¶иҝҳдёҚж”ҜжҢҒ SRV и®°еҪ•.**
4. йҖҡиҝҮ `!!server reload` жқҘеҲ·ж–°й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶, жІЎжңүеҲ·ж–°жҲҗеҠҹе°ұжүӢеҠЁйҮҚиҪҪжҸ’д»¶.
5. еҗҜеҠЁжёёжҲҸзҷ»е…ҘдҪ зҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁз„¶еҗҺдҪҝз”Ё `!!server list` жқҘиҝӣиЎҢжөӢиҜ•.
6. жғіиҰҒи·ЁжңҚиҒҠеӨ©иҜ·дҪҝз”ЁиҜҘжҸ’д»¶: [Chat Bridge](https://github.com/TISUnion/ChatBridge)

***
## Configuration
```json
{
    "serverList": {
        "_comment": "иҝҷйҮҢжҳҜдҪ зҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁеҗҚеӯ—",
        "Survival": { 
            "_comment": "ж·»еҠ ең°еқҖдёҺз«ҜеҸЈ",
            "address": "local",
            "port": 25565
        },
        "_comment": "иҰҒж·»еҠ еӨҡдёӘжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ,йҮҚеӨҚжӯҘйӘӨеҚіеҸҜ",
        "Creative": {
            "address": "localhost",
            "port": 25575
        }
    }
}
```

***
## Commands
- `!!server`:  жҳҫзӨәиҜҘжҸ’д»¶зҡ„её®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ.
- `!!server <Target Server>`: еҸӘиғҪз”ұе®ўжҲ·з«ҜеҸ‘иө·зҡ„жҢҮд»Ө, е°ҶзҺ©е®¶иҮӘе·ұиҪ¬еҸ‘еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ.
- `!!server list`: жҳҫзӨәжңҚеҠЎеҷЁзҫӨз»„зҡ„зҠ¶жҖҒ.
- `!!server reload`: йҮҚиҪҪй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶. еҰӮжһңдёҚиө·ж•ҲиҜ·йҖҡиҝҮ !!MCDR plugin жүӢеҠЁйҮҚиҪҪжҸ’д»¶
- `!!server redirect <Target Server> <Target Player>`: з®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳжқғйҷҗзҡ„жҢҮд»Ө, е°ҶзҺ©е®¶иҪ¬еҸ‘еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„жңҚеҠЎеҷЁ

repository.name: ShowIt
repository.readme:
# ShowIt

Get someone's head, or show your item to other players.

You can get a player's head by `!!skull <player>`. For example: `!!skull Notch` can get Notch's head.

And, you can show your handed item in chat by `!!show`.

Your item will display like this:

![image](https://github.com/WhiteXero/ShowIt/assets/96997038/54018ad4-5c15-4d4c-a89b-9e8a448a935c)

repository.name: Calculator
repository.readme:
Simple Calculator
------

A simple in game calculator plugin for [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) >= `2.1.0`

Requires [simpleeval](https://pypi.org/project/simpleeval/) module

Configure file: `config/simple_calculator/config.json`

## Usage

It will calculate the expression with an extra prefix `==` such as `==1+1`. All unrelated chars will be ignored

Try input `==3**4-(1+3.0)` or `==sin(0.5*pi) + (0x1A >> 1)` in game chat and that's it

-----
[дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/R1ckyH/simple_test/blob/master/README_cn.md)

A plugin to check [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) basic issue with **Minecraft Server**

repository.readme: # рҹҢҗ Simple Translator [![license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/skuzow/simple-translator.svg)](https://github.com/skuzow/simple-translator/blob/master/LICENSE) [![package](https://github.com/skuzow/simple-translator/actions/workflows/package.yml/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://github.com/skuzow/simple-translator/actions/workflows/package.yml) [![python versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/python->=%203.6%20-blue)](https://www.python.org/downloads) Really simple [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) in-game translator plugin. More plugins in [MCDReforgedPluginsCatalogue](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue/blob/catalogue/readme.md). ## рҹ—ҝ How it works? Basically translates from `global_language` to `secondary_language` & all languages to `global_language`. To use it simply type: `t what you want to translate` ## рҹ’ҫ Config Location: `config/simple_translator.json` ```json { "global_language": "en", "secondary_language": "es" } ``` ## рҹ—ӮпёҸ Required Python libraries - [mcdreforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) >= 2.0.0 - [googletrans](https://pypi.org/project/googletrans/4.0.0rc1) == 4.0.0rc1 To install them execute: ```bash pip install -r requirements.txt ```

- English
- [дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/kmcsr/smart_backup_mcdr/tree/master/README_zh.MD)

# Smart Backup

### Feature

- Support *Full Backup* / *Incremental Backup* / *Differential Backup*
- Support **timed backup**
- Support **auto clean** outdated backups

### Notes

- The backup created with `!!smb make(full)` is **not going to** *auto clean*
- **Don't** change/remove files in `./smt_backup`, if you really need, please remove the **whole folder**
- If you remove `./smt_backup` when *the plugin is running*, that probably will cause some *unknown error*

repository.readme:
- English
- [дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/kmcsr/smart_servertime_mcdr/tree/master/README_zh.MD)

# Smart Server Time

*If it's useful, please give a star :)*

## Feature

- Server will stop automagically when **all players leave** the server
- Massive savings on your server's CPU :)
- Server will start when some player is trying connect to the server
- Support server **cooldown timeout**
- Support **manually start/stop** your server
- Support *Minecraft Client Packet*, response ***correctly** ping request*, **send server status to player** who is *tring connect*
- Supports **reverse proxy** mode _(`enable_proxy` need to be set to `true`)_

## Dependencies

| ID                                                      | Release Link                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| [kpi](https://github.com/kmcsr/kpi_mcdr)                | <https://github.com/kmcsr/kpi_mcdr/releases>         |
| [delayexe](https://github.com/kmcsr/delayexe_mcdr)      | <https://github.com/kmcsr/delayexe_mcdr/releases>    |
| [loginproxy](https://github.com/kmcsr/login_proxy_mcdr) | <https://github.com/kmcsr/login_proxy_mcdr/releases> |

## TODO

repository.name: StatsHelper
repository.readme:
StatsHelper
-------

дёҖдёӘз»ҹи®ЎдҝЎжҒҜеҠ©жүӢзҡ„  [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) жҸ’д»¶пјҢеҸҜжҹҘиҜў/жҺ’еҗҚ/дҪҝз”Ёи®ЎеҲҶжқҝеҲ—еҮәеҗ„зұ»з»ҹи®ЎдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ

йҖӮз”ЁзүҲжң¬пјҡ1.13д»ҘдёҠжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ

# ж јејҸиҜҙжҳҺ

`!!stats` жҳҫзӨәеё®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ

`!!stats save` <д»ЈеҗҚ> <з»ҹи®Ўзұ»еҲ«> <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> <ж Үйўҳ> дҝқеӯҳдёҖдёӘеҝ«йҖҹи®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

`!!stats del` <д»ЈеҗҚ> з§»йҷӨдёҖдёӘеҝ«йҖҹи®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

`!!stats list` еҲ—еҮәе·Ідҝқеӯҳзҡ„еҝ«йҖҹи®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

`!!stats query` <зҺ©е®¶> <з»ҹи®Ўзұ»еҲ«> <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> [<-uuid>] [<-tell>]

`!!stats query` <зҺ©е®¶> <д»ЈеҗҚ> [<-uuid>] [<-tell>]

`!!stats rank` <з»ҹи®Ўзұ»еҲ«> <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> (-bot) [<-tell>]

`!!stats rank` <д»ЈеҗҚ> (-bot) [<-tell>]

`!!stats scoreboard` <з»ҹи®Ўзұ»еҲ«> <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> (ж Үйўҳ) (-bot)

`!!stats scoreboard` <д»ЈеҗҚ> жҳҫзӨәдёҖдёӘеҝ«йҖҹи®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

`!!stats scoreboard show` жҳҫзӨәиҜҘжҸ’д»¶зҡ„и®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

`!!stats scoreboard hide` йҡҗи—ҸиҜҘжҸ’д»¶зҡ„и®ЎеҲҶжқҝ

## еҸӮж•°иҜҙжҳҺ

<з»ҹи®Ўзұ»еҲ«>: killed, killed_by, dropped, picked_up, used, mined, broken, crafted, custom, killed, killed_by зҡ„ <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> дёә [з”ҹзү©id]

picked_up, used, mined, broken, crafted зҡ„ <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> дёәзү©е“Ғ/ж–№еқ—id

custom зҡ„ <з»ҹи®ЎеҶ…е®№> иҜҰи§Ғз»ҹи®ЎдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„jsonж–Үд»¶пјҢжҲ– [MC Wiki](https://minecraft.fandom.com/zh/wiki/%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%A1%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF)

дёҠиҝ°еҶ…е®№ж— йңҖеёҰminecraftеүҚзјҖ

[<-uuid>]: з”ЁuuidжӣҝжҚўзҺ©е®¶еҗҚ; (-bot): з»ҹи®ЎbotдёҺcam; [<-tell>]: д»…иҮӘе·ұеҸҜи§Ғ

## дҫӢеӯҗ

`!!stats save fly custom aviate_one_cm йЈһиЎҢжҰң`

`!!stats query Fallen_Breath used water_bucket`

`!!stats rank custom time_since_rest -bot`

`!!stats scoreboard mined stone жҢ–зҹіжҰң`

# й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶

`server_path`: жңҚеҠЎз«Ҝзҡ„е·ҘдҪңи·Ҝеҫ„

`world_folder`: еӯҳжЎЈж–Үд»¶еӨ№гҖӮеӯҳжЎЈеӣ дҪҚдәҺжңҚеҠЎз«Ҝзҡ„е·ҘдҪңи·Ҝеҫ„д№Ӣдёӯ

`save_world_on_query`: жҳҜеҗҰеңЁдҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `!!stats query` ж—¶дҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `/save-all` дҝқеӯҳдё–з•Ң

`save_world_on_rank`: жҳҜеҗҰеңЁдҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `!!stats rank` ж—¶дҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `/save-all` дҝқеӯҳдё–з•Ң

`save_world_on_scoreboard`: жҳҜеҗҰеңЁдҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `!!stats scoreboard` ж—¶дҪҝз”ЁжҢҮд»Ө `/save-all` дҝқеӯҳдё–з•Ң

`player_name_blacklist`: дёҖдёӘеӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҲ—иЎЁпјҢеӮЁеӯҳзқҖз”ЁдәҺжҹҘиҜўзҡ„зҺ©е®¶й»‘еҗҚеҚ•пјҢдҪҚдәҺе…¶дёӯзҡ„зҺ©е®¶дёҚдјҡиў«з»ҹи®ЎгҖӮжҜҸдёҖдёӘеӯ—з¬ҰдёІеқҮдёәдёҖдёӘжӯЈеҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸжЁЎејҸдёІпјҢдҪҶдёҖдёӘзҺ©е®¶зҡ„еҗҚз§°иў«е…¶дёӯд»»ж„ҸдёҖдёӘжЁЎејҸдёІеҢ№й…ҚдёҠж—¶пјҢиҜҘзҺ©е®¶е°Ҷиў«еҝҪз•Ҙ

description.en_us: Check the player's IP to prevent impersonation of logging into the offline server

introduction.en_us:
## :page_facing_up: Description Check the player's IP to prevent impersonation of logging into the offline server
жЈҖжөӢзҺ©е®¶IPд»ҘйҳІжӯўеҶ’еҗҚзҷ»йҷҶзҰ»зәҝжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
## :telescope: How the plugin work This plugin will check player's IP when a player join the server. If the IP is NOT match the record, then kick the player and broadcast in server.
иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶дјҡеңЁзҺ©е®¶иҝӣе…ҘжңҚеҠЎеҷЁж—¶жЈҖжҹҘзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPең°еқҖпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҺи®°еҪ•дёҚз¬ҰпјҢеҲҷе°ҶзҺ©е®¶иёўеҮәе№¶е…ЁжңҚе№ҝж’ӯ
## :balloon: Lightweight, plug and play Simpler, lightweight, plug and play
жӣҙз®ҖеҚ•гҖҒиҪ»йҮҸеҢ–пјҢеҚіжҸ’еҚіз”Ё
## :exclamation: Warning Only matches the IP address received by the server and player name, and the player original IP cannot be obtained for similar proxy connections. More details in README file
жҸ’д»¶еҸӘеҢ№й…ҚжңҚеҠЎеҷЁжҺҘж”¶еҲ°зҡ„зҡ„IPең°еқҖе’ҢзҺ©е®¶еҗҚпјҢеҜ№зұ»дјјд»ЈзҗҶзҡ„ж–№ејҸиҝһжҺҘеҲҷжІЎжі•иҺ·еҸ–зҺ©е®¶жәҗIPпјҢиҜҰи§ҒREADMEж–Үд»¶
## :snake: Commands **All the commands need MCDR permissions at least level 2**
**жүҖжңүе‘Ҫд»ӨйғҪйңҖиҰҒMCDR 2зә§жқғйҷҗ**
| command | description | | -------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | `!!offlineops` | view the commands list жҹҘзңӢе‘Ҫд»ӨеҲ—иЎЁ | | `!!offlineops` `notOpsPlayerProtect`/ `nopp` | nomal player protect options йқһз®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳзҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `protectPlayer`/ `pp` | add protected player ж·»еҠ еҸ—дҝқжҠӨзҡ„зҺ©е®¶ | | `!!offlineops` `allPlayerProtect`/ `app` | all players protect options е…ЁдҪ“зҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `multi-ip` | get a chance to append new IP иҺ·еҫ—иҝҪеҠ ж–°IPзҡ„жңәдјҡ | | `!!offlineops` `delIP` | delete player's or all the IP record жё…йҷӨеҜ№еә”жҲ–е…ЁйғЁзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPи®°еҪ• |

| command | description | | -------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | `!!offlineops` | view the commands list жҹҘзңӢе‘Ҫд»ӨеҲ—иЎЁ | | `!!offlineops` `notOpsPlayerProtect`/ `nopp` | nomal player protect options йқһз®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳзҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `protectPlayer`/ `pp` | add protected player ж·»еҠ еҸ—дҝқжҠӨзҡ„зҺ©е®¶ | | `!!offlineops` `allPlayerProtect`/ `app` | all players protect options е…ЁдҪ“зҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `multi-ip` | get a chance to append new IP иҺ·еҫ—иҝҪеҠ ж–°IPзҡ„жңәдјҡ | | `!!offlineops` `delIP` | delete player's or all the IP record жё…йҷӨеҜ№еә”жҲ–е…ЁйғЁзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPи®°еҪ• |

repository.name: the_offline_ops
repository.description: A MCDReforged plugin. Provides a method to protect admin and normal player's account in game server, which 'online-mode' is 'false'
repository.readme:
# the-offline-ops A **[MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) plugin**
More plugins click *[here](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue)* ## :page_facing_up: Description Check the player's IP to prevent impersonation of logging into the offline server
жЈҖжөӢзҺ©е®¶IPд»ҘйҳІжӯўеҶ’еҗҚзҷ»йҷҶзҰ»зәҝжңҚеҠЎеҷЁ
## :telescope: How the plugin work This plugin will check player's IP when a player join the server. If the IP is NOT match the record, then kick the player and broadcast in server.
иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶дјҡеңЁзҺ©е®¶иҝӣе…ҘжңҚеҠЎеҷЁж—¶жЈҖжҹҘзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPең°еқҖпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҺи®°еҪ•дёҚз¬ҰпјҢеҲҷе°ҶзҺ©е®¶иёўеҮәе№¶е…ЁжңҚе№ҝж’ӯ
![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ltBerryshdo/the_offline_ops/main/image.png)
If you don't like filling in some difficult configuration file and feel that checking the player's IP is enough, you can try this plugin
еҰӮжһңдҪ дёҚе–ңж¬ўеҺ»ж‘Ҷеј„дёҖдәӣи®©дәәзңӢдёҚжҮӮзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶пјҢе№¶дё”и§үеҫ—жЈҖжөӢзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPе°ұи¶іеӨҹзҡ„иҜқпјҢеҸҜд»ҘиҜ•иҜ•иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶

Use `!!offlineops` commmand to view the configuration commands and no need to change the config file by yourself
йҖҡиҝҮ`!!offlineops`жҹҘзңӢй…ҚзҪ®е‘Ҫд»ӨгҖӮж— йңҖеҠЁжүӢж”№configж–Үд»¶

Put the \*.mcdr file in your MCDR plugin directories, MCDR will load it and begin to work
Lightweight, plug and play
жҠҠ\*.mcdrж–Үд»¶дёўе…ҘжҸ’д»¶ж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҢе°ұејҖе§Ӣе·ҘдҪңдәҶ
иҪ»йҮҸеҢ–пјҢеҚіжҸ’еҚіз”Ё

But if you have a higher requests for security, You can go to [Plugin Repository](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue) to find plugins with higher security
дҪҶжҳҜеҰӮжһңдҪ еҜ№е®үе…ЁжҖ§жңүиҫғй«ҳзҡ„йңҖжұӮзҡ„иҜқпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҺ»[жҸ’д»¶д»“еә“](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue/blob/master/readme_cn.md)еҜ»жүҫе®үе…ЁжҖ§жӣҙй«ҳзҡ„жҸ’д»¶ ## :snake: Commands **All the commands need MCDR permissions at least level 2**
**жүҖжңүе‘Ҫд»ӨйғҪйңҖиҰҒMCDR 2зә§жқғйҷҗ**
| command | description | | -------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | `!!offlineops` | view the commands list жҹҘзңӢе‘Ҫд»ӨеҲ—иЎЁ | | `!!offlineops` `notOpsPlayerProtect`/ `nopp` | nomal player protect options йқһз®ЎзҗҶе‘ҳзҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `protectPlayer`/ `pp` | add protected player ж·»еҠ еҸ—дҝқжҠӨзҡ„зҺ©е®¶ | | `!!offlineops` `allPlayerProtect`/ `app` | all players protect options е…ЁдҪ“зҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨејҖе…і | | `!!offlineops` `multi-ip` | get a chance to append new IP иҺ·еҫ—иҝҪеҠ ж–°IPзҡ„жңәдјҡ | | `!!offlineops` `delIP` | delete player's or all the IP record жё…йҷӨеҜ№еә”жҲ–е…ЁйғЁзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPи®°еҪ• | ## :wrench: Config ``` json { "notOpsPlayerProtect": true, //nomal player protectжҷ®йҖҡзҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨ "allPlayerProtect": false, //all players protectжүҖжңүзҺ©е®¶дҝқжҠӨ "protectivePlayer": { //protected playerеҸ—дҝқжҠӨзҡ„зҺ©е®¶ "lightberryshdo": ["127.0.0.1"] } } ``` ## :exclamation: Issue In extreme cases (such as manually modifying the player's IP in the configuration file, etc.), the IP check may be error-prone, it is recommended to restart the plugin with the following command and try again:
жңүжһҒз«Ҝжғ…еҶөпјҲеҰӮжүӢеҠЁдҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯзҺ©е®¶зҡ„IPзӯүзӯүпјүIPжЈҖжҹҘеҸҜиғҪдјҡеҮәзҺ°й”ҷиҜҜпјҢе»әи®®з”Ёд»ҘдёӢе‘Ҫд»Өе°ҶжҸ’д»¶йҮҚеҗҜпјҢе№¶еҶҚж¬Ўе°қиҜ•пјҡ `!!MCDR plugin reload the_offline_ops` ## :mag: Details Player's IP is the parsed result from the server or from the console:
зҺ©е®¶IPзҡ„иҺ·еҸ–жҳҜеңЁиҝҷжқЎжңҚеҠЎеҷЁж ҮеҮҶиҫ“еҮәдёӯиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„пјҡ > lightberryshdo[/127.0.0.1:54095] logged in with entity id 220 at (5.907554675563178, 64.0, 8.053519850174403) Parsed code:
и§Јжһҗд»Јз Ғпјҡ ```python import re def on_info(server: PluginServerInterface, info: Info): if not info.is_user and re.search(r'logged in with entity id', info.content): logginInfo = re.search(r'(\w+)\[/(\d+.\d+.\d+.\d+):(\d+)\] logged in with entity id', info.content) if logginInfo: global IPaddress #playerName = logginInfo.group(1) IPaddress = logginInfo.group(2) #port = logginInfo.group(3) ```

repository.name: TimedQBM
repository.description: A Quick-Backup-Multi extension for automatically trigger QBM at given interval
repository.readme:
Timed QuickBackupM
-------

[English](https://github.com/TISUnion/TimedQBM/blob/master/README_en.md) | дёӯж–Ү

дёҖдёӘ [QuickBackupM](https://github.com/TISUnion/QuickBackupM) жҸ’д»¶зҡ„жү©еұ•пјҢз”ЁдәҺе®ҡж—¶и§ҰеҸ‘ QBM д»ҺиҖҢиҝӣиЎҢиҮӘеҠЁеӨҮд»Ҫ

еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁдјҡеңЁ QBM еӨҮд»Ҫз»“жқҹгҖҒе®ҡж—¶еҷЁиў«жүӢеҠЁеҗҜеҠЁ/е…ій—ӯ/йҮҚзҪ®ж—¶пјҢйҮҚзҪ®дёҠж¬ЎеӨҮд»Ҫж—¶й—ҙдёәеҪ“еүҚж—¶й—ҙ

жҜҸеҪ“зҰ»дёҠж¬ЎеӨҮд»Ҫзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙй—ҙйҡ”еӨ§дәҺдәҶй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„еӨҮд»Ҫж—¶й—ҙй—ҙйҡ”пјҢTQBM дјҡи§ҰеҸ‘дёҖж¬Ў QBM зҡ„еӨҮд»Ҫ

еҸҜй…ҚеҗҲ QBM жҸ’д»¶й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶зҡ„ `delete_protection` ж•°еҖјжқҘйҒҝе…Қ TQBM иҰҶзӣ–иҝҮеӨҡеӨҮд»Ҫ

## йңҖжұӮ

- [MCDR](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) >=2.0.0

- [QuickBackupM](https://github.com/TISUnion/QuickBackupM) >=1.1.0

## й…ҚзҪ®

й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёә `config/timed_quick_backup_multi.json`

```json
{
  "enabled": true,
  "interval": 30.0,
  "permission_requirement": 2,
  "require_online_players": false
}
```

- `enable`: TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁжҖ»ејҖе…і
- `interval`: TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁзҡ„й—ҙйҡ”пјҢеҚ•дҪҚдёәеҲҶй’ҹ
- `permission_requirement`: дҪҝз”Ё `!!tqb` жҢҮд»Өзҡ„жңҖе°ҸжқғйҷҗйңҖжұӮ
- `require_online_players`: еҪ“и®ҫдёә true ж—¶пјҢTQBM д»…еңЁжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёӯеӯҳеңЁзҺ©е®¶ж—¶еҗҜз”ЁгҖӮиҝҷйңҖиҰҒ TQBM еңЁжңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҗҜеҠЁзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеӨ„дәҺе·ІеҠ иҪҪзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢеҗҰеҲҷ TQBM е°ҶдјҡеҒңжӯўе·ҘдҪң

## жҢҮд»Ө

- `!!tqb`: жҳҫзӨә TQBM её®еҠ©дҝЎжҒҜ
- `!!tqb enable`: еҗҜеҠЁ TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁ
- `!!tqb disable`: е…ій—ӯ TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁ
- `!!tqb set_interval <minutes>`: и®ҫзҪ® TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁж—¶й—ҙй—ҙйҡ”пјҢеҚ•дҪҚеҲҶй’ҹ
- `!!tqb reset_timer`: йҮҚзҪ® TQBM еӨҮд»Ҫе®ҡж—¶еҷЁ
- `!!tqb status`: жҹҘзңӢ TQBM зҠ¶жҖҒ

repository.readme:
- English
- [дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/kmcsr/tpmanager_mcdr/tree/master/README_zh.MD)

# Tp Manager

*If it's useful, please give a star :)*

## Feature

- Teleport between players

## TODO

- Check if target player exists
- Teleport cooldown
- Manage in game way points
- Linking with login_proxy?

## Dependencies

| ID                                       | Release Link                                 |
| ---------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| [kpi](https://github.com/kmcsr/kpi_mcdr) | <https://github.com/kmcsr/kpi_mcdr/releases> |

## Commands

| Command format         | Introduction                                  |
| ---------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `!!tp help`            | Show help message, aka `!!tp`                 |
| `!!tp pos <x> <y> <z>` | Teleport to `<x>`, `<y>`, `<z>`               |
| `!!tp ask <name>`      | Send an teleport request, aka `!!tpa`         |
| `!!tp askhere <name>`  | Send an teleport request to here, aka `!!tph` |
| `!!tp accept`          | Accept the teleport request                   |
| `!!tp reject`          | Reject the teleport request                   |
| `!!tp cancel`          | Cancel your teleport request                  |

## Config files

#### tpm/config.json

```javascript
{
    "minimum_permission_level": { // Command permissions
        "pos": 2,
        "ask": 1,
        "askhere": 1,
        "accept": 1,
        "reject": 0,
        "cancel": 0
    },
    "teleport_expiration": 10, // in sec, the teleport request expiration
    "teleport_commands": [ // Command list for teleport players
        "say Teleporting {src} to {dst} ...",
        "tp {src} {dst}",
    ],
    "teleport_xyz_command": "tp {name} {x} {y} {z}" // Command for teleport position
}
```

description.en_us: Query players' coordinates

releases.description:
## What's new in v2.1

1. Inline here (suggested by [EasonSYC](https://github.com/EasonSYC) in TISUnion/Here#19 and TISUnion/Here#25)

    After option `enable_inline_here` is enabled (default to `false`), command `!!here` in almost any position of chat message can be responded. 

    There's a slight difference between this implement and TISUnion/Here#25: Command `!!here` should be divided with space to other words in chat message

2. `minecraft` dimension translation mode key customization

    Now you can modifying translation keys in config option `custom_vanilla_translation_key` to avoid translation failure. Custom

## Other changes

1. `broadcast_to_console` option in configuration

   When this is enabled, `!!here` message and `!!vris/!!whereis <player> -a` message will be sent to MCDR console. In old versions, all the broadcast message would be sent to console.

2. Now dimension translation mode is default to `mcdr`.

   Translation key for dimensions has been changed for a long time, `minecraft` mode is not suitable to be the default mode anymore.

## Fixes

1. Fixed a problem that makes MCDReforged language preference invalid for 'here' and 'where is' broadcast message

2. Fixed a problem that allows invalid 'where is' arguments be ignored


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lazy-Bing-Server/WhereIs-MCDR/compare/2.0.2...2.1.0

releases.description:
# Feature updates

1. New function: `!!here`. The same as [Here](https://github.com/TISUnion/Here)
2. Now the dimension names are allow to be configured in configuration. Using these translation for vanilla dimensions requires `mcdr` mode for `dimension_translation_mode`. Non-vanilla dimensions are also supported and `mcdr` mode is not required for these dimensions (`minecraft` mode can't translate non-vanilla dimensions so these dimensions will always be tranlated with `mcdr` mode).

# Known issue 
Updating to this version will make all your configuration lost. Here're 2 ways to avoid this lost:
1. Back your configuration up and configure after updating.
2. Configure `command_prefix` and `highlight_time` item with new values before updating.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lazy-Bing-Server/WhereIs-MCDR/compare/1.1.0...2.0.0

repository.name: WhereIs-MCDR
repository.readme:
**English** | [з®ҖдҪ“дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/Lazy-Bing-Server/WhereIs-MCDR/tree/master/README_zh.md)

Where Is
-------

A [MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) plugin, inspired by [Fallen_Breath's](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath) [Here](https://github.com/TISUnion/Here) and [Ivan-1F's](https://github.com/Ivan-1F) [Where](https://github.com/Ivan-1F/MCDReforged-Plugins/tree/master/where)

## Dependencies

[MinecraftDataAPI](https://github.com/MCDReforged/MinecraftDataAPI/)

[MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) >= 2.1.3

## Commands

1. `!!whereis` or `!!vris`пјҲcan be modified in configпјүпјҡShow coordinate of other player

Command format: `!!whereis <player> [args(optional)]`

вҖӢ	`-a` or `-s` arguments are allowed (can be called in one argument as `-as` or `-sa`)

вҖӢ	`-a` means broadcasting coordinate to **a**ll the players and highlight target player

вҖӢ	`-s` means **s**udo, allows querying coordinate of protected players

вҖӢ	Both 2 arguments requires `admin` permission level in the config file of this plugin

2. `!!here` (can be modified in configпјү: Broadcast your current coordinate

вҖӢ	Any `!!here` divided with space in chat message can be responded if inline here is enabled in config. **New in version 2.1**

## Config File

Several features can be modified with configuration file, which will be generated automatically in `config/where_is/config.json`

Calling `!!MCDR plg reload where_is` to reload is required to make it loaded after modifying

Here is the config items in the file

**WARNING: These 2 items which are marked with asterisk below should be configured manually before you update to 2.x or you'll lose all the configuration during loading the new version!!! You can ignore this message if you haven't install this plugin before**

| Keys                             | Value type                      | Default value           | Introduction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `enable_where_is`                | `bool`                          | `true`                  | Set it to `true` to enable query other player location                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `enable_here`                    | `bool`                          | `true`                  | Set it to `true` to enable broadcast your location                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `enable_inline_here`             | `bool`                          | `false`                 | Set it to `true` to make inline here enabled. **New in version 2.1**                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| *`command_prefix`                | `dict`(which includes 2 items)  | In the following sheets | Command prefix of this plugin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `broadcast_to_console`           | `bool`                          | `true`                  | `!!here` or `!!vris <player> -a` will also send message to server console                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `permission_requirements`        | `dict`(which includes 3 items)  | In the following sheets | Minimum permission of commands                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| *`hightlight_time`               | ``dict`(which includes 2 items) | In the following sheets | Highlight player time when coordinates are broadcasted to all the ones.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `display_waypoints`              | `dict`(which includes 2 items)  | In the following sheets | If the text would include waypoint text of minimap                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `query_timeout`                  | `int`                           | `3`                     | Timeout of Minecraft Data API (seconds)                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `click_to_teleport`              | `bool`                          | `true`                  | Allow player click to fill the teleport command (still requires operator permission)                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `location_protection`            | `dict`(which includes 5 items)  | In the following sheets | Player coordinate protection configuration                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `dimension_translation_mode`     | `Literal['mcdr', 'minecraft']`  | `'mcdr'`                | `mcdr`: MCDReforged translates dimension names; `minecraft`: Minecraft translates dimension names. In 1.19 and later versions, using `mcdr` will avoid translation failure due to these dimension key change.                                                         |
| `custom_dimension_name`          | `Dict[str, Dict[str, str]]`     | Too long to show        | A mapping of dimension name translation for `mcdr` translation mode. This fist layer keys are the languages. The second layer keys are the dimension IDs (Non-vanilla dimensions are allowed. vanilla dimensions are required to fill and should omit the namespace). |
| `custom_vanilla_translation_key` | `Dict[str, str]`                | Too long to show        | A mapping of dimension translation keys for `minecraft` translation mode. (Non-vanilla dimensions are allowed. vanilla dimensions are required to fill and should omit the namespace). **New in version 2.1**                                                         |

In the sheet above, the items which have stable items is showing below:

**The asterisked items contents goes here:**

| Keys of`command_prefix` | Value type | Default value           | Introduction                          |
| ----------------------- | ---------- | ----------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `where_is`              | `str`      | ['!!vris', '!!whereis'] | Command prefix to query locations     |
| `here`                  | `str`      | ['!!here']              | Command prefix to broadcast locations |

| Keys of`highlight_time` | Value type | Default value | Introduction                                                               |
| ----------------------- | ---------- | ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `where_is`              | `int`      | `0`           | Highlight player time when  querying other player's location and broadcast |
| `here`                  | `int`      | `15`          | Highlight player time when  broadcasting your location                     |

The rest are the regular items:

| Keys of`permission_requirements` | Value type | Default value | Introduction                                                             |
| -------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `where_is`                       | `int`      | `1`           | Permissions which allows query location without extra arguments          |
| `here`                           | `int`      | `0`           | Permissions which allows broadcast your location without extra arguments |
| `admin`                          | `int`      | `3`           | Permissions which allows query location with extra arguments             |

| Keys of`display_waypoints` | Value type | Default value | Introduction                                                                                                                                                                        |
| -------------------------- | ---------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `voxelmap`                 | `bool`     | `true`        | If it is `true` a text (`[+V]`) will be displayed, click to highlight the location, ctrl-click to add waypoint to [Voxelmap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/voxelmap) |
| `xaero_minimap`            | `bool`     | `true`        | If it is `true` a text (`[+X]`) will be displayed, click to add waypoint to [Xaero's Minimap](https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php)                                          |

| Keys of`location_protection` | Value type | Default value                                             | Introduction                                                                          |
| ---------------------------- | ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `enable_whitelist`           | `bool`     | `false`                                                   | Enable querying whitelist, which blocks the player **NOT** in this list being queried |
| `enable_blacklist`           | `bool`     | `true`                                                    | Enable querying whitelist, which blocks the player in this list being queried         |
| `whitelist`                  | `list`     | empty list                                                | whitelist, which blocks the player **NOT** in this list being queried                 |
| `blacklist`                  | `list`     | empty list                                                | Enable querying whitelist, which blocks the player in this list being queried         |
| `protected_text`             | `dict`     | `'en_us': 'He/She\'s in your heart!', 'zh_cn': 'TaеңЁдҪ еҝғйҮҢ!'` | Text replied when querying blocked, supports language preference of MCDReforged       |

## Example

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Lazy-Bing-Server/WhereIs-MCDR/master/img.png)

introduction.en_us:
# Whisper [дёӯж–Ү](https://github.com/ltBerryshdo/Whisper/tree/main/./README.md)
A **[MCDReforged](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged) plugin**
More plugins click *[here](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue)* [![issue](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/ltBerryshdo/Whisper?color=orange)](https://github.com/ltBerryshdo/Whisper/issues) [![Github stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ltBerryshdo/Whisper)]() ## Description Send some private message to others at same time in easier way.
Use triggers (default'**') to send private messages to everyone the player specifies. ## How to use 1. Use `!!whisper ` command add player(s) can receive private message 2. Prepare a writable_book and rename it to "MCDRwhisper" and place it in the hotbar 3. Write your whispered words in writable_book~, be careful not to break lines 4. Then enter the default trigger ** in the chat bar 5. They should be able to hear from you~ 6. Before whispering the next time, remember to empty the contents of the writable_book ~~пјҲI originally wanted to clear it automatically, but I won't use /data commandпјү~~ 7. Just that, you can avoid using commands such as /tell to send messages to different people one by one ## Attention - The message to be sent needs to be written in a writable_book called "MCDRwhisper" in the hotbar - Make sure there is no LINE BREAKS in the message to be sent - Before whispering the next time, remember to EMPTY the contents of the writable_book ## Dependencies | Plugin ID | Requirement | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------- | | [minecraft_data_api](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue/blob/catalogue/plugins/minecraft_data_api/readme.md) | * | ## Command | command | description | | ------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `!!whisper` | Display this message | | `!!whisper` `` | Add target players to receive private message(Multiple parameters are acceptable) | | `!!whisper` `list` | Display all the player in the list | | `!!whisper` `clear` | Delete the list | | `!!whisper` `delmum` `` | Delete player(Multiple parameters are acceptable) | | `!!whisper` `cp` `` | Copy someone's contacts |

# Whisper [English](https://github.com/ltBerryshdo/Whisper/tree/main/./README_EN.md)

еӨ§еЈ°еҜҶи°ӢпјҲbushi)
дҪҝз”Ёи§ҰеҸ‘еҷЁпјҲй»ҳи®Өдёә '**' пјүпјҢеҗ‘зҺ©е®¶жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„жүҖжңүдәәеҸ‘йҖҒз§ҒеҜҶдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ ## еҰӮдҪ•дҪҝз”Ё 1. дҪҝз”Ё`!!whisper `е‘Ҫд»Өж·»еҠ иғҪж”¶еҲ°жӮ„жӮ„иҜқзҡ„зҺ©е®¶пјҲд»¬пјү 2. еҮҶеӨҮдёҖжң¬ д№ҰдёҺз¬” е№¶дё”йҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚдёә вҖңMCDRwhisperвҖқпјҢе°Ҷе…¶ж”ҫеңЁеҝ«жҚ·ж Ҹдёӯ 3. еңЁд№ҰдёҺз¬”дёӯеҶҷдёӢдҪ зҡ„жӮ„жӮ„иҜқ~пјҢжіЁж„ҸдёҚиҰҒжҚўиЎҢ 4. з„¶еҗҺеңЁе…¬е…ұиҒҠеӨ©ж Ҹиҫ“е…Ҙи§ҰеҸ‘еҷЁпјҢй»ҳи®Өдёә ** 5. TAд»¬еә”иҜҘе°ұиғҪж”¶еҲ°дҪ зҡ„жқҘдҝЎдәҶ~ 6. еңЁдёӢдёҖж¬ЎиҜҙжӮ„жӮ„иҜқеүҚпјҢи®°еҫ—жё…з©әд№ҰдёҺз¬”йҮҢзҡ„еҶ…е®№ ~~пјҲжң¬жқҘжғіиҮӘеҠЁжё…йҷӨзҡ„пјҢз»“жһңдёҚдјҡз”Ё/dataе‘Ҫд»Өпјү~~ 7. е°ұй…ұпјҢеҸҜд»ҘдёҚз”Ё/tellзӯүе‘Ҫд»ӨдёҖжқЎжқЎз»ҷдёҚеҗҢзҡ„дәәеҸ‘ж¶ҲжҒҜдәҶ ## жіЁж„Ҹ - еҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜиҜ·еӮЁеӯҳеңЁеҝ«жҚ·ж ҸйҮҢеҗҚдёә вҖң MCDRwhisper вҖқ зҡ„д№ҰдёҺз¬”дёӯгҖӮ - зЎ®дҝқеҫ…еҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜжІЎжңү жҚўиЎҢз¬Ұ - еңЁеҸ‘йҖҒдёӢдёҖжқЎж¶ҲжҒҜеүҚпјҢиҜ·е…Ҳ жё…з©ә д№ҰдёҺз¬”зҡ„еҶ…е®№ ## дҫқиө– | Plugin ID | Requirement | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------- | | [minecraft_data_api](https://github.com/MCDReforged/PluginCatalogue/blob/catalogue/plugins/minecraft_data_api/readme.md) | * | ## е‘Ҫд»Ө | command | description | | ------------------------------- | ---------------------- | | `!!whisper` | жҹҘзңӢе‘Ҫд»ӨеҲ—иЎЁ | | `!!whisper` `` | ж·»еҠ зҺ©е®¶дҪңдёәжӮ„жӮ„иҜқзҡ„еҖҫеҗ¬иҖ…(еҸҜжҺҘеҸ—еӨҡдёӘеҸӮж•°) | | `!!whisper` `list` | еҲ—еҮәеҲ—иЎЁдёӯжүҖжңүзҡ„зҺ©е®¶ | | `!!whisper` `clear` | еҲ йҷӨеҲ—иЎЁе’ҢзҺ©е®¶ | | `!!whisper` `delmum` `` | еҲ йҷӨзҺ©е®¶(еҸҜжҺҘеҸ—еӨҡдёӘеҸӮж•°) | | `!!whisper` `cp` `` | жҠҠеҸҰдёҖдёӘзҺ©е®¶зҡ„йҖҡи®ҜеҪ•еӨҚеҲ¶иҝҮжқҘ |

# WikiRequest


**2.xзүҲжң¬е·Іж”ҜжҢҒпјҢ0.xгҖҒ1.xзүҲжң¬дёҚеҶҚжҸҗдҫӣж”ҜжҢҒпјҢж—§жҸ’д»¶дҝқз•ҷжңҖеҗҺзүҲжң¬пјҢеҸҜеңЁReleasesжүҫеҲ°гҖӮ**

иҝҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘMCDRжҸ’д»¶пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеңЁжёёжҲҸдёӯжҹҘиҜўд»»ж„ҸMediaWikiдёҠзҡ„йЎөйқўгҖӮжҹҘиҜўеҶ…е®№еҢ…жӢ¬йЎөйқўеҗҚз§°гҖҒй“ҫжҺҘе’ҢextractгҖӮ

жіЁж„ҸпјҡиҜҘжҸ’д»¶дҫқиө–requestsеә“пјҢиҜ·жҸҗеүҚдҪҝз”Ё`pip install requests`е®үиЈ…

е…·дҪ“дҪҝз”Ёж–№жі•иҜ·еңЁжёёжҲҸдёӯдҪҝз”Ё`!!wiki help`иҺ·еҸ–гҖӮ



ж„ҹи°ў[OasisAkari](https://github.com/OasisAkari)е’Ңд»–зҡ„[QQжңәеҷЁдәә](https://github.com/Teahouse-Studios/bot)жҸҗдҫӣдәҶеҲӣдҪңзҒөж„ҹгҖӮ
ж„ҹи°ў[дҪӣеҶ·](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath)зҡ„[MCDR](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged)гҖӮ

repository.readme:
# WorldCopier

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/for-mcdr2-9cf?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=blue)](https://github.com/Fallen-Breath/MCDReforged)

е°Ҷй•ңеғҸжңҚдёҺз”ҹеӯҳжңҚеҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ

> вҡ пёҸ д»…ж”ҜжҢҒеҗҢжӯҘж•ҙдёӘеӯҳжЎЈпјҢйңҖиҰҒйғЁеҲҶеҗҢжӯҘиҜ·з”Ё [RegionFileUpdater](https://github.com/TISUnion/RegionFileUpdater)

## вқӨпёҸ зү№еҲ«ж„ҹи°ў

иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶зҡ„еӨ§йғЁеҲҶд»Јз ҒжқҘиҮӘ [`TISUnion/QuickBackupM`](https://github.com/TISUnion/QuickBackupM)гҖӮ

## рҹҡӘ еүҚзҪ®

- MCDReforged >= 2.2.0

## рҹ’» жҢҮд»Ө

`!!sync`: з«ӢеҚіеҗҢжӯҘ

`!!sync abort`: еҸ–ж¶ҲеҗҢжӯҘ

## рҹ“„ й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶

з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎиҝҗиЎҢж—¶пјҢжҸ’д»¶дјҡз”ҹжҲҗй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶ **config/world_cpier/config.json**гҖӮиҜҘж–Үд»¶еҶ…е®№еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

```json5
{
    "command": "!!sync", // е‘Ҫд»ӨеүҚзјҖ
    "permission": 0, // жқғйҷҗ
    "source_path": "/foo/bar/qb_multi/slot1", // еҗҢжӯҘжқҘжәҗпјҢе»әи®®и®ҫзҪ®дёәдё»жңҚ QBM ж§ҪдҪҚ 1
    "world_list": [
        "world" // еӯҳжЎЈж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҗҚз§°
    ],
    "server_path": "./server", // йңҖиҰҒеҗҢжӯҘзҡ„дё–з•Ңж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҲ—иЎЁпјҢеҺҹзүҲжңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҸӘдјҡжңүдёҖдёӘдё–з•Ң
    "backup": false, // еҗҢжӯҘеүҚжҳҜеҗҰиҝӣиЎҢдёҖж¬ЎеӨҮд»Ҫд»ҘйҒҝе…Қе°ҸеӨ©жүҚ
    "backup_path": "./sync_backup", // еӨҮд»Ҫи·Ҝеҫ„
    "timed_sync": -1, // е®ҡж—¶еҗҢжӯҘпјҢеҚ•дҪҚдёәеҲҶй’ҹпјҢ<=0 дёәзҰҒз”Ё
    "ignored_files": [
        "seesion.lock" // еҗҢжӯҘж—¶еҝҪз•Ҙзҡ„ж–Үд»¶гҖӮеҸҜд»Ҙ * дҪңдёәйҖҡй…Қз¬ҰеҢ№й…Қд»Ҙжҹҗдәӣеӯ—з¬ҰејҖеӨҙжҲ–з»“е°ҫзҡ„ж–Үд»¶
    ]
}
```
> вҡ пёҸ жӯӨеӨ„дҪҝз”Ё json5 ж јејҸй«ҳдә®д»ҘеҜ№й…ҚзҪ®йЎ№иҝӣиЎҢи§ЈйҮҠпјҢе®һйҷ…й…ҚзҪ®ж јејҸдёә json, дёҚеҸҜдҪҝз”ЁжіЁйҮҠгҖӮ
